title: Final Cut
description: Dead by Daylight styled addon for Palladium! Play Minecraft as a dangerous Killer with unique powers and abilities!
body:
[![FinalCut_Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a52b63a6ce7868e8b06cfde6fa079cbd4bc56861_0.webp)](https://final-cut.fandom.com/wiki/Final_Cut_Wiki)

## **"Your story ends here"**

Step into the shoes of pop culture’s most terrifying icons, from **Springtrap** to **Jason Voorhees**, **Slenderman**, and more.
Harness their twisted abilities, stalk your victims, and claim your place among the legends of horror.

## **Features**
### **Become the Killer**

Choose from an expanding roster of horror legends, each with unique powers, weapons, and abilities.

### **Iconic Killers**

Each killer has a unique model, sound set, animations, and playstyle, giving you a fresh experience every time. Whether you prefer brute force, stealth, or supernatural abilities, there’s a killer for every style of hunt.

### **Token System**

Obtain killers through Token Bags, which grant a random killer token. Collect them all, trade them, or use them to surprise your friends with unpredictable transformations.

### **Simple Yet Deadly**

Final Cut keeps things streamlined, no grinding, no progression systems. Just you, your killer, and the hunt.

### **PvP-Ready Horror**

Designed with multiplayer mayhem in mind. Transform into your favorite killer and let your friends run for their lives, or make your own survival challenges and roleplay scenarios.

![Killer_Roster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d124ebad884f7c01e15d6cdd74b60e4890bb7e9a.png)

## Stay Tuned!

The roster of killers is always expanding.

Join our Discord for teasers and updates!

[![Discord_8bit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101eb7b229b5d6909e52e95bca95bc9ded60a41f.png)](https://discord.gg/2K7quhrdrr)





**Requirements**

- Palladium
- Geckolib
- Pehkui
- Architectury API
- Kubejs 
- Rhino
- Packet Fixer (Optional but recommended)
- Forge Config API Port (If on Fabric)
